creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #1)
As I indicated in D37706, the patch looks good. I'm
only concerned we've gone from 8.0 to 8.2 with for
no apparent reason. The CHANGELOG that comes with
the source doesn't say anything. The file VERSION
that comes with the source claims: 8.0.
It looks like somethings wrong in claiming this
version to be 8.2.

Thanks.

--Chris
